nasb.text: Moreover, the Lord said to me, “Son of man, will you judge Oholah and Oholibah? Then declare to them their abominations.

esv.text: The Lord said to me: “Son of man, will you judge Oholah and Oholibah? Declare to them their abominations.

cnv.text: 耶和華又對我說：“人子啊，你要審判阿荷拉和阿荷利巴嗎？你要把她們可憎的事向她們說明，

ccb.text: 耶和华又对我说：“人子啊，你要审判阿荷拉和阿荷利巴，指出她们的丑行。
